context:
CREATE VIEW customers_desc AS
SELECT cust_id AS customer_id, name AS customer_name, email AS customer_email,
       region, plan AS plan_type, joined AS signup_date, rep AS sales_rep
FROM customers;

CREATE VIEW products_desc AS
SELECT sku AS product_sku, product AS product_name, cat AS category,
       price AS list_price_cents
FROM products;

CREATE VIEW orders_desc AS
SELECT oid AS order_id, cust_id AS customer_id, sku AS product_sku,
       dt AS order_date, qty AS quantity, unit_price AS unit_price_cents,
       discount AS discount_pct, revenue AS revenue_cents, refunded AS is_refunded
FROM orders;

Use customers_desc, products_desc, and orders_desc in all queries.
